hero.title: House & Office Moving Services in Semarang
hero.subtitle: Professional moving services from Indo Mover — careful packing, safe transport, and an experienced team for home, office, warehouse, and apartment relocations across Semarang.
hero.waMessage: Hi Indo Mover, I'd like to ask about your moving services.

about.title: Professional Movers in Semarang
about.body: Indo Mover provides moving services for homes, offices, warehouses, and apartments in Semarang and the surrounding area. We focus on the safety of your belongings, on-time delivery, and customer satisfaction—from survey and packing all the way to unloading. Our moving services have been trusted by hundreds of families and businesses across Central Java.

modal.waMessage: Hi Indo Mover, I'm interested in your {service} service. Can you share more details?

items.title: Professional Packing
items.desc: Careful packing of valuables with the right materials—bubble wrap, sturdy boxes, and corner protectors—for both home and office moves.
bullets: Special handling for fragile items & electronics

items.title: Safe Moving Transport
items.desc: Closed, well-maintained trucks with proper tie-downs—for in-city moves around Semarang or inter-city relocations.
bullets: Closed trucks in multiple sizes (small, medium, large)

items.title: Loading & Unloading
items.desc: A team ready for heavy lifting and furniture handling, including disassembly and reassembly—part of our complete moving services.
bullets: Reorganization to match your new layout

items.title: Office & Commercial Moving
items.desc: Specialized handling for office, retail, and warehouse moves in Semarang with minimal operational downtime.
bullets: Survey and scheduling outside business hours

why.title: Why Choose Indo Mover for Your Move

items.title: Professional
items.desc: Trained team, neat uniforms, and clear communication from start to finish—the standard for professional moving services.

items.title: Safety
items.desc: Proven packing and handling SOPs to minimize the risk of damage during the move.

items.title: Flexible
items.desc: Moving schedule that adapts to your needs—including weekends and evenings.

testimonials.title: What Indo Mover Customers Say

items.name: Budi S.
items.quote: I used Indo Mover for our office relocation. Fast, professional, and the price matched the quality.

items.q: How much does a moving service in Semarang cost?
items.a: The cost depends on the volume of items, distance, and add-ons such as packing or loading-unloading. Indo Mover offers a free on-site survey to give you an accurate quote before the move.
We serve home, office, and apartment moves across Semarang and the surrounding area, plus inter-city moves throughout Central Java and beyond.

items.q: Are belongings insured during the move?
items.a: Insurance is available as an add-on for high-value items. Details can be discussed during the survey.

items.q: How long does a typical home move take?
items.a: Usually 4–8 hours for an in-city home move in Semarang, depending on volume and access. Inter-city moves vary by route.
Yes. We have a dedicated team for office, retail, and warehouse moves with after-hours scheduling so your business isn't disrupted.

items.q: How do I book Indo Mover?
items.a: Just reach out on WhatsApp. The team will schedule a free on-site survey and give you a quote tailored to your move.

cta.title: Need a Mover in Semarang? Start Here
